# openai_project_model_permissions (Resource)

Manage project model permissions.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "openai_project_model_permissions" "example" {
  project_id = "proj_123"
  mode       = "allow_list"
  model_ids  = ["api.organization.read"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `mode` (String) mode
- `model_ids` (List of String) model ids
- `project_id` (String) project id

### Read-Only

- `object` (String) object

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = openai_project_model_permissions.example
  id = "proj_123"
}
```
